subcodes.first_line: Every soul must, in this Day, ponder upon that which hath been made manifest and, with understanding and wisdom, diligently investigate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید هر نفسی امروز در آنچه ظاهر شده تفکر کند و بعقل و درایت خود تفحص نماید که
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @independent investigation of truth; reality
